God’s Not Dead 2 (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $20,773,069Details
International Box Office $2,778,217
Worldwide Box Office $23,551,286
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,215,104
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,964,040
Total $8,179,144
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Grace, a Christian teacher, is forced before a judge for honestly answering a question about Jesus in the classroom. With the principal and superintendent joining forces with a zealous civil liberties group, Grace faces an epic court case that could cost her career she loves and expel God from the classroom.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,623,662 (36.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.72 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:88.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$5,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,419 opening theaters/2,419 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $28,722,072

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 1st, 2016 (Wide) by Pure Flix Entertainment
International Releases: April 7th, 2016 (Wide) (South Korea)
April 8th, 2016 (Wide) (Poland)
April 8th, 2016 (Wide) (Brazil)
April 20th, 2016 (Wide) (Mexico)
April 29th, 2016 (Wide), released as God's Not Dead 2 (New Zealand)
Video Release: July 26th, 2016 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2404 (Cert #50181), 12/16/2015)
Running Time: 121 minutes
Franchise: God’s Not Dead
Cast, crew, or production detail: Agitprop
Plot point: Christians, Religious, Teachers
Subgenre: Courtroom / Legal Drama
Target audience: Faith-Based Film
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Pure Flix, 10 West Studios, Mutiny FX, GND Media Group, Believe Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Grace, a Christian teacher, is forced before a judge for honestly answering a question about Jesus in the classroom. With the principal and superintendent joining forces with a zealous civil liberties group, Grace faces an epic court case that could cost her career she loves and expel God from the classroom.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,623,662 (36.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.72 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:88.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$5,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,419 opening theaters/2,419 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $28,722,072
